# Codex Prompt — Phase 0 Repo Inventory

```text
Read AGENTS.md and docs/openvision/00_INDEX.md.

Do not edit yet.

Analyze the current repository and output:
1. folder structure summary
2. current Android/Rokid app paths, if present
3. current Jetson/backend paths, if present
4. current model/runtime paths
5. current cloud API call locations
6. current HUD output locations
7. current logging/session paths
8. whether perception graph exists
9. whether skill manifest/registry exists
10. whether cloud gateway exists
11. whether scorecard/replay tools exist
12. top 10 architectural risks
13. recommended first 3 PRs

Use this V2 philosophy:
Rokid = sensor + HUD
Jetson = local perception brain + skill router
Cloud AI = reasoning escalator

Do not make code changes in this step.
```
